subject: feat(theme): add theme combo picker to burger menu
body:
Users can now choose from 8 curated light/dark theme pairs via the burger
menu. Each combo is a tested DaisyUI light + dark theme that work well
together. Caramel & Coffee (caramellatte/coffee) remains the default.

Combos: Nord & Night, Emerald & Forest, Autumn & Dim, Cupcake & Dracula,
Lofi & Black, Garden & Luxury, Pastel & Synthwave.

The dark/light toggle still works independently within any combo. Choice
persists in localStorage and syncs across tabs. Flash prevention scripts
updated to read the stored combo on page load.

Tags: ui, theme, daisyui, burger-menu
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-combos
Semver: minor
